pi_items.source: Bridge Command official GitHub repository (https://github.com/bridgecommand/bc) - scenario exists in bin/Scenarios/i) Portsmouth Night Entry/
Task description specifies clicking Start and entering simulation. State is reasonable given task requirements, though cannot be independently verified without execution.

Bridge Command scenario environment.ini shows: StartTime=5 (05:00), SunRise=6 (06:00), SunSet=18 (18:00). Start time is before sunrise, confirming night conditions. Description file confirms: 'Entry into Portsmouth Harbour by night.'

privileged_info_summary: The target scenario 'i) Portsmouth Night Entry' is a real scenario from the official Bridge Command ship simulator (GitHub: bridgecommand/bc). The simulation starts at 05:00 hours with sunrise at 06:00, confirming nighttime conditions. The scenario involves entering Portsmouth Harbour with a vessel named 'Protis' at an initial bearing of 348 degrees and speed of 12 knots. Initial position is at coordinates 50.771423N, 1.092073W (Portsmouth Harbour area). Visibility range is 8 nautical miles with calm sea state (Weather=0, Wind=5 knots). The scenario is a genuine nighttime harbor navigation exercise from the official Bridge Command distribution.
